'''Lirin Banolt''' was a [[Con artist/Legends|conman]] who operated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
Banolt was secretly working for [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]], stealing priceless artifacts for Pestage's personal collection. In exchange for this work, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] overlooked Banolt's more shady dealings which involved posing as an [[Imperial Procurement Agent]]. Banolt would then run a scam which involved accepting a large bribe in exchange for the promise of an exclusive deal. After accepting the bribe, Banolt would disappear to another area and run the same scam. While running these scams, Banolt operated under several aliases, including Bruhas Drey, Kier Dom, and Ran Nammon. Under the name Kier Dom, Banolt succeeded in conning [[Huff Darklighter]].

[[File:Storm_vid_recording.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The execution of Lirin Banolt]]
However, Pestage eventually decided to end Banolt's lucrative criminal career. Banolt had discovered the location of the [[Eidolon (Strike-class)|''Eidolon'']], and becoming greedy, he tried to blackmail Pestage. Pestage would not play that game and had [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] execute the overreaching conman. After Banolt's death, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] came upon footage of the execution on Tatooine, believing that it was more evidence of the corruption of the Empire. However, they also found a broken [[Imperial HoloVision]] [[Subspace transceiver/Legends|transceiver]], verifying that Banolt was something more than a simple conman.
